who: HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month
offer: For HR operations managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll entries/month, discrepancies in time tracking cause payroll errors. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of time tracking and payroll data.
problem: Discrepancies between employee time tracking and payroll entries
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations managers
Indie Hackers posts on time tracking solutions
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and discrepancy alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
